/usr/bin/c++  -fopenmp -O3 -DNDEBUG -O3 CMakeFiles/gmgpolar.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gmgpolar.dir/src/Level/level.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gmgpolar.dir/src/GMGPolar/gmgpolar.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gmgpolar.dir/src/GMGPolar/gmgpolar_initializeLevels.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gmgpolar.dir/src/GMGPolar/gmgpolar_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gmgpolar.dir/src/GMGPolar/select_exact_function_class.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gmgpolar.dir/src/Interpolation/prolongation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gmgpolar.dir/src/Interpolation/restrictionGive.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gmgpolar.dir/src/Interpolation/restrictionTake.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gmgpolar.dir/src/Operator/matrixA.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gmgpolar.dir/src/PolarGrid/anisotropic_division.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gmgpolar.dir/src/PolarGrid/load_write_grid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gmgpolar.dir/src/PolarGrid/multiindex.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gmgpolar.dir/src/PolarGrid/point.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gmgpolar.dir/src/PolarGrid/polargrid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gmgpolar.dir/src/TaskDistribution/TaskDistribution.cpp.o -o gmgpolar  /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/11/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a
